1.premise: Forrest Gump's innocence would misread racist and violent history.
A KKK rally could be an innocent bonfire with friends in ghost costumes to Forrest Gump.

2.premise: Waterboarding could be charitable hydration to Forrest Gump.

lines.text: Uh, what's up, dogs?
lines.label: fluff

lines.text: Chill.
lines.label: fluff

lines.text: I was watching Forrest Gump the other day.
lines.label: setup

lines.text: Where my gump heads at?
lines.label: fluff

lines.text: I don't know.
lines.label: fluff

lines.text: I just had this thought when I was watching the movie.
lines.label: setup

lines.text: You know the part of the movie, it's like a guy
lines.label: setup

lines.text: goes through history, and he's like slow.
lines.label: setup

lines.text: He doesn't know what's going on.
lines.label: setup

lines.text: I thought it would be really funny if Forrest Gump was
lines.label: setup

lines.text: involved with a bunch of really racist shit and had no idea.
lines.label: setup

lines.text: You know?
lines.label: fluff

lines.text: It's like, I went to the woods with my new friends.
lines.label: setup

lines.label: setup

lines.text: and I left 'cause I got hot.
